testcase.name: sniper joins auction until auction closes

failure.message: Tried to find: exactly 1 JFrame (with name "MAIN_WINDOW" and showing on screen) in all top level windows but: all top level windows contained 0 JFrame (with name "MAIN_WINDOW" and showing on screen)

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Tried to find: exactly 1 JFrame (with name "MAIN_WINDOW" and showing on screen) in all top level windows but: all top level windows contained 0 JFrame (with
